headline: Can Western Digital Deliver Continued Gross Margin Improvement?
summary: WDC's Q3 FY26 gross margin jumps to 50.5% on higher-capacity drives, pricing and cost controls, with revenues up 45% to $3.3B; Q4 guide: 51%-52%.

raw.headline: Can Western Digital Deliver Continued Gross Margin Improvement?

headline: Dell's business strength separate from AI servers was very impressive, says BofA's Wamsi Mohan
summary: Wamsi Mohan, BofA Securities senior IT hardware analyst, joins 'The Exchange' to discuss Dell's quarterly earnings results, the company's position in the AI race and much more.

headline: RAMpocalypse: After Huge Rally, What I See Happening Next In The Chip Sector

headline: A Look At Seagate Technology Holdings (STX) Valuation After Strong Q3 AI Storage And HAMR Momentum
summary: Seagate Technology Holdings (STX) recently reported fiscal third quarter results that topped expectations, pointing to firm demand from data center customers tied to AI and multimodal workloads, as well as progress with its Mozaic HAMR platform. See our latest analysis for Seagate Technology Holdings. The strong fiscal Q3 update, upbeat AI storage commentary and recent debt exchanges have arrived alongside intense share price momentum. headline: Veteran analyst has blunt message on Sandisk stock after massive rally
summary: Shares of Sandisk have been on a massive run this year as investors continue piling into artificial intelligence-related memory and storage names.
